quality_highlights: stale-pr-cleanup.md: Professional status messages with clear emojis (🧹/✅/❌), actionable failure context ('Some PRs may not be processed'), includes {status} variable
safe_outputs_needs_validation.go: Error messages include specific bad value, expected values, and a concrete example in one message — model pattern
aw-yml-package-manifest.md: Clean reference table with inline example comments explaining each file type; links to normative spec

single_file_improvements.issue: Three-way documentation inconsistency: (1) Line 64 bare domain comment 'Matches api.example.com and subdomains' uses non-standard behavior with no point-of-use explanation; (2) Line 65 wildcard comment says 'any subdomain of cdn.example.com' omitting the base domain; (3) Line 70 bullet correctly states *.example.com matches example.com itself — contradicting line 65. The TIP on line 74 explains the behavior but is positioned after the confusing content.

All three status messages use theatrical hawk metaphors (run-started: 'circles the sky', run-success: 'reconnaissance / Intel delivered', run-failure: 'Hawk down! The skies grow quiet'). Recurring pending task since 2026-05-27. run-failure provides no actionable guidance. Scope expanded from prior finding: all three messages need replacement, not just run-failure.
